# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: mesh-admin-config
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        includeIPRanges: "*"
        excludeIPRanges: ""
      pilotCertProvider: istiod
  components:
    pilot:
      k8s:
        overlays:
          - apiVersion: apps/v1
            kind: Deployment
            name: istiod
            patches:
              - path: spec.template.spec.containers.[name:discovery].env.[name:PILOT_ENABLE_ADMIN_ENDPOINTS]
                value: "true"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - /config_dump
              - /stats
              - /clusters
              - /server_info
              - /certs
              - /listeners
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: sidecar
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-debug
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - mesh
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            exact: /config_dump
        - uri:
            exact: /stats
        - uri:
            exact: /clusters
      route:
        - destination:
            host: 127.0.0.1
            port:
              number: 15000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-access-note
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  note: "Envoy admin interface is exposed on port 15000 on sidecars for debugging. Restrict access with network policies and strict RBAC in production."
